description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On June 21, 2025 at 1:46 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a collision 
involving a heavy truck on Florida Street near 22nd Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southbound on a narrow portion of Florida Street and came to a stop to yield to a heavy truck stopped facing 
north on Florida Street. While the Waymo AV remained stopped, the heavy truck proceeded forward to pass the Waymo AV and the driver 
side of the heavy truck made contact with the rear driver side of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s 
Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
